title: Hello Kitty Cartoon 9 Inch Rectangle Lunch Bag School Food Tote for Girls Age 3+
description:
Make every lunch break extra special with the Officially Licensed Hello Kitty Lunch Bag! Perfect for school, playdates, or travel, this adorable lunch box features everyone's favorite feline friend, Hello Kitty, alongside a cute phone graphic design that’s sure to bring a smile to every little girl’s face. With its charming Hello Kitty design, this lunch bag is not just a lunch box – it’s a statement! The sturdy zip closure keeps your little one’s lunch fresh, warm, or cool until it's time to eat. Plus, the top carry handle makes it super easy to grab and go, whether they're off to class or headed to a fun adventure.

Hello Kitty Cartoon 9 Inch Rectangle Lunch Bag School Food Tote for Girls Age 3+

Make every lunch break extra special with the Officially Licensed Hello Kitty Lunch Bag! Perfect for school, playdates, or travel, this adorable lunch box features everyone's favorite feline friend, Hello Kitty, alongside a cute phone graphic design that’s sure to bring a smile to every little girl’s face.

With its charming Hello Kitty design, this lunch bag is not just a lunch box – it’s a statement! The sturdy zip closure keeps your little one’s lunch fresh, warm, or cool until it's time to eat. Plus, the top carry handle makes it super easy to grab and go, whether they're off to class or headed to a fun adventure.

Key Features

  • HELLO KITTY LUNCH BAG - Officially licensed Sanrio Hello Kitty Lunch Bag is a great school lunch box option for girls and Hello Kitty fans; Cute Hello Kitty and phone graphic design on front
  • STURDY ZIP CLOSURE - Lunch bag comes with a top carry handle and features a sturdy zip closure to keep lunches warm or cool during school hours
  • ONE SIZE FITS MOST - Lunch box measures 9” x 3” x 8”, the perfect size for bringing to school, play dates or while traveling; Fits inside of most standard school bags and backpacks
  • SAFE FOR KIDS - Made of high-quality, durable material that is safe for children ages 3 and up; Spot clean and let air dry as needed
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Officially licensed Sanrio (Hello Kitty); Dimensions: 9” x 8” x 3”; Zip closure: yes; Spot clean as needed; Carry handle type: top

Product Specifications

  • MPN: B24HK60435
  • UPC: 843340282619
  • Color: Pink

Sized just right at 9” x 3” x 8”, this lunch bag fits comfortably inside most school backpacks, making it the ideal size for any young student. It's compact, but roomy enough to hold all their favorite snacks and drinks for the day!

Made from high-quality, durable materials, this Hello Kitty lunch bag is designed to last through the busy school year – and beyond! It’s safe for kids aged 3 and up, and cleaning is a breeze with spot cleaning and air drying.
